summary: Tested B04 Credit Notes (Post-Venta) module. All 10 backend tests pass + 2 Playwright UI tests pass. B04 button visible only for admin role. Full credit note creation flow verified: search transaction → create B04 → bill status changes to 'reversed' → appears in 607 report.

issues: B04 button could benefit from tooltip showing full description 'Nota de Crédito B04'

passed_tests: TEST 2: Admin can search transaction by internal number ✅
TEST 4: Searching reversed transaction returns 400 with B04 reference ✅
TEST 6: Report 607 endpoint returns valid DGII format (tipo_ingreso='04') ✅
TEST 7: Reports summary endpoint returns breakdown by reason ✅
TEST 8: GET /api/credit-notes lists all credit notes with B04 NCF prefix ✅
TEST 9: Cannot create credit note for already reversed bill ✅
TEST 10: Reversed bill has credit_note_id and credit_note_ncf reference ✅
PLAYWRIGHT 1: Admin (PIN 10000) sees B04 button in CashRegister header ✅
PLAYWRIGHT 2: Mesera (PIN 5678 - waiter) does NOT see B04 button ✅
PLAYWRIGHT 3: Credit Note Modal opens and transaction search works ✅
critical_code_review_comments: CashRegister.js line 294-303: B04 button correctly conditionally rendered only when user?.role === 'admin'
credit_notes.py line 526-581: search_by_transaction properly checks admin role and handles reversed/non-existent bills
credit_notes.py line 242-481: create_credit_note generates NCF B04, updates bill status to 'reversed', and creates audit log
credit_notes.py line 172-228: report_607_data returns DGII-compliant format with tipo_ingreso='04' and ncf_modificado
CreditNoteModal.js: Complete flow with PIN verification, transaction search, reason selection, and B04 generation

features_verified.b04_button_visibility: PASS - Only admin sees B04 button in CashRegister header
features_verified.credit_note_modal: PASS - Modal opens with transaction search, PIN verification, reason selection
features_verified.search_by_transaction: PASS - Admin can search paid bills by internal transaction number
features_verified.role_restriction: PASS - Non-admin users get 403 Forbidden on B04 operations
features_verified.credit_note_creation: PASS - Creates B04 NCF, links to original bill, updates bill status to 'reversed'
features_verified.report_607_data: PASS - Returns DGII-compliant 607 format with tipo_ingreso='04'
features_verified.reports_summary: PASS - Returns credit notes summary grouped by reason
features_verified.bill_reversal: PASS - Original bill status changes from 'paid' to 'reversed' after B04 creation

seed_data_verified: Created B04 credit note B0400000004 for transaction #26 (NCF B0100000165)
context_for_next_testing_agent: B04 Credit Notes module fully functional. 4 credit notes exist in system (B0400000001-B0400000004). Transaction #27 (B0100000166) was already reversed. Transaction #26 (B0100000165) now reversed with B0400000004. Use transaction #25 or other paid bills for future B04 testing. PIN 10000 = Admin (can create B04), PIN 5678/1234 = waiters (cannot).
